name: Cross Channel Mule Detection Platform
desc: Financial crime intelligence platform combining Temporal Graph Networks (TGN), Variational Graph Autoencoders (VGAE), and Quantum ML on streaming transaction data. Detects money-mule networks, shell company chains, and layering patterns in real time with a full risk-scoring dashboard and explainable audit trails.

name: D2R — Dream to Reality
desc: Hybrid agentic AI system under active redevelopment with a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture. Domain-specific agents for feasibility, design, and resource planning collaborate under a master orchestrator converting abstract ideas into executable pipelines, structured documentation, and slide decks.

name: AgroBot
desc: Closed-loop precision pesticide rover using pixel-level computer vision to generate infection segmentation maps, convert them into nozzle orientation vectors, and micro-dose only infected plant regions. Post-spray images close the loop detecting under-coverage and recalibrating angle, pulse duration, and pump activation in real time. Patent filed with Intellectual Property India (App. No. 202641065168).

name: Multilingual Speech Platform
desc: Dual-pipeline multilingual speech assessment system for disordered speech built in 36 hours (3rd place, Dataset'25). Fine-tuned Whisper ASR on DSP-synthesised slurring data; parallel fluency pipeline for prosody analysis, pause detection, and disfluency scoring. LLM layer generates clinician-grade reports and parent-friendly summaries.

name: Obesity Sentiment Analysis
desc: Analysed 100,000+ obesity-related tweets (2017–2021) via a dual-annotation pipeline, TextBlob lexicon scoring + RoBERTa contextual labelling. Trained SVM, Naive Bayes, Random Forest, and LSTM classifiers; SVM achieved 93% accuracy. Presented at ICVADV-2026 (IEEE CIS) and indexed on IEEE Xplore.

name: QuizChain
desc: Decentralised quiz platform anchoring assessment logic to the Ethereum blockchain via a Solidity smart contract eliminating trust problems in digital assessment. MetaMask wallet authentication, SHA-256 / SHA-3 tamper-proof submission hashing, an auto-submit countdown timer, and a Chart.js performance analytics dashboard for teachers.

name: Battery ETL Dashboard
desc: Automated ETL pipeline wrapped in a native Tkinter GUI that transforms raw Windows battery diagnostic HTML (via powercfg) into a four-view interactive analytics dashboard. Modules cover recent usage trends, energy drain, historical charge capacity, and estimated battery life with a secure session manager that purges all temp files on exit.

name: Respiratory State Detection
desc: Multimodal wearable system combining ECG-derived HRV/EDR features with a mechanical chest band for real-time classification of Normal Breathing, Breath Hold, and Deep Breathing states built for clinical radiotherapy workflows. Sequence-aware detection logic implemented via Graph Neural Networks (GNN).

name: Twitter Sentiment Analysis
desc: A hybrid quantum-classical NLP framework for semantic analysis of vaccine-related discourse. Combines Quantum Machine Learning (QML) encoding with BERT-based contextual language modelling to classify and interpret sentiment and intent in vaccine conversations across public health datasets.

name: CRC Survival Prediction
desc: Stacking ensemble of LightGBM, CatBoost, MLP, Random Forest, and Logistic Regression, meta-learner hyperparameters tuned by the bio-inspired Pufferfish Optimisation Algorithm (POA), achieving 83.50% accuracy and 0.9203 ROC-AUC on 515,791 SEER patient records. Three-stage feature selection pipeline reduced 146 attributes to 21 finalised features.
